# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because the source is a serious empirical preprint with substantial real-world results.

## Why

The source clearly reports original experimental and observational findings, including quantitative analysis of 33k agent-authored pull requests, logistic regression results, CI and review outcome patterns, and manual annotation of hundreds of rejected PRs. That gives it clear empirical substance and makes it institute-worthy under the preprint criterion.

## Limits
